title: hieracium murorum subsp. lyratifolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. lyratifolium is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly found in mountainous regions and characterized by its unique, lyrate-shaped leaves. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. lyratifolium include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as sprains and bruises. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
